working: getPublicFilename() in watcher — strips 8-digit code prefix, optionally prepends full artist name
/production/ and /mixing/ serve with Content-Disposition: inline; filename=<public>
/create-submission copies files using public filename (no code prefix in submission folder)
ProjectsTab: getPublicFilename() available as frontend helper
ProjectsTab: sendToArtist adds public_filename to share session song entry
ListenPage: download buttons use public_filename for download attribute
ListenPage: filename shown in small text below download buttons
Files on disk unchanged — presentation only
next: Test by sending a version to artist — check that listen page shows clean filename and download has correct name. Existing share sessions without public_filename will fall back to stripping code prefix from song.filename.
notes: getPublicFilename handles the case where artist is already in filename (prevents double-prepend). Filenames like 26040604_PILAR_VEGA_MACHO_MIX_v01.wav -> PILAR_VEGA_MACHO_MIX_v01.wav correctly.
